introSection: Sierra Tonante was a wooden roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The ride opened in 1992 and closed in 2007 to make room for ISpeed. Sierra Tonante was Italian for Thundering Mountain Range.
fullText:
Sierra Tonante was a wooden roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The ride opened in 1992 and closed in 2007 to make room for ISpeed. Sierra Tonante was Italian for Thundering Mountain Range.



Unpainted track and white supports.
